sourcebooks.name: HANFA Pravilnici (Rulebooks)
sourcebooks.authority: HANFA — Hrvatska agencija za nadzor financijskih usluga
sourcebooks.license: Public domain — official Croatian government publication
sourcebooks.notes: HANFA rulebooks covering investment services (ZTK), capital markets, insurance, and pension funds. 1229+ URLs processed by the ingest pipeline.

sourcebooks.name: HANFA Smjernice (Guidelines)
sourcebooks.authority: HANFA — Hrvatska agencija za nadzor financijskih usluga
sourcebooks.license: Public domain — official Croatian government publication
sourcebooks.notes: HANFA supervisory guidelines and official positions (službena stajališta).

sourcebooks.name: HNB Odluke (Decisions)
sourcebooks.authority: HNB — Hrvatska narodna banka (Croatian National Bank)
sourcebooks.license: Public domain — official Croatian government publication
sourcebooks.notes: HNB decisions on regulatory capital (regulatorni kapital), liquidity, and banking supervision. Coverage is partial and ongoing.

known_gaps: HNB banking decision coverage is partial — systematic crawling is ongoing
Historical (superseded) versions of pravilnici are not systematically stored
HANFA enforcement actions are partially indexed
